message.content:
@startuml
participant "進行役" as Moderator #LightBlue2
participant "自分：プレイヤー\n(あなた)" as SelfPlayer #YellowGreen
participant "隣のプレイヤー:\nプレイヤー" as NeighborPlayer #Pink
database "隣の手札:" as HandDB #Skyblue

Moderator -> SelfPlayer : 順番を指名する（隣のプレイヤー）\nturn = neighbor_player_id
activate SelfPlayer
SelfPlayer -> NeighborPlayer : hand_out()\ncard_index=0
NeighborPlayer --> SelfPlayer : return card_value \n(card="3")
deactivate NeighborPlayer
note right of SelfPlayer: カードの値が小さいほど強い
SelfPlayer -> HandDB : draw_card()
HandDB --> SelfPlayer : new_hand=[...] 
@enduml
